Run Free AI AuditBook Call [...] The most documented complaints about AI search visibility solutions center on one failure: inconsistency. The same brand query, run on the same LLM, returns different citations depending on time of day, user context, and prompt phrasing. Tools that ignore this variability produce rankings that mislead rather than inform.

### How Prompt Diversity Makes Rankings Unreliable

results.title: What an AI Visibility Audit Actually Covers for SMBs | Elementera AI
results.content:
For businesses that depend on local walk-in traffic, voice assistants (Siri, Alexa, Google Assistant) should also be included in the audit scope. A customer asking their phone for "the best plumber near me" is using a different retrieval system than someone typing into ChatGPT, and the citation signals that power voice answers differ accordingly.

‍

## ‍How AI visibility gets scored and what the numbers mean

One of the most common complaints about AI visibility audits is that the scoring feels arbitrary. Understanding the metrics behind the score lets you evaluate any vendor proposal intelligently.

A credible audit uses at least five primary metrics to build a composite score:

results.title: How to Run a Free AI Visibility Audit with Semrush
results.content:
Crawler access: Whether your robots.txt file or meta tags block AI crawlers like ChatGPT-User, OAI-Searchbot, or Google-Extended. If you're blocking these crawlers, AI systems can't properly crawl your content.
 Content Structure: Whether your pages use clear headings, semantic HTML, and structured data that help both search engines and AI systems understand and retrieve your content. Poor structure makes pages harder to index and cite.
 Indexability Issues: Technical problems like broken links, redirect chains, or duplicate content that prevent both search engines and AI systems from properly cataloging your site.

### What this tells you

A low AI Search Health score means there are technical barriers limiting your AI visibility. [...] Here's a simple way to interpret your results:

Strong AI Search Health score, but low mentions: Your site is accessible to AI crawlers, but your content isn't earning citations. That's a content gap, not a technical one. Focus on creating content that directly answers the questions buyers ask at the discovery and comparison stages.

Low mentions and a weak AI Search Health score: Technical barriers are likely limiting your visibility before content even comes into play. Fix crawler access, content structure, and indexability issues first, and then layer in content improvements. [...] SEMRUSH ONE

## FAQ: AI Search Visibility Audit

### What is an AI search visibility audit?

An AI search visibility audit is a structured review of how often and how positively your brand appears in AI generated answers on tools like ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Bing Copilot and Perplexity. It looks at mentions, links, sentiment and competitor benchmarks, then converts that into a clear picture of your "share of voice" in AI search. [...] The problem: doing this by hand, across multiple tools, with multiple variations, becomes a time sink.

The free AI Search Visibility Audit tool automates this step. You simply enter:

 Your domain and brand name
 A few main competitors

The system then probes AI search engines with structured prompts around your niche and counts how often your brand appears in:

 Recommendation style answers ("What tools should I use?")
 Comparison answers ("X vs Y vs Z")
 Definition and "how to" answers where tools get name dropped

The result is an AI Visibility Score - a single metric that summarizes how often and how prominently you are present across AI answers related to your space.

## Step 2 - Check Citations, Links And Positions

Being mentioned is good. Being cited and linked is better. [...] ### Is the AI Search Visibility Audit tool really free?

Yes. The AI Search Visibility Audit on this page is 100% free to use. You do not need a credit card and you are not starting a trial that will auto renew.
